title: quercus tenorei
intro: Quercus tenorei, also known as the Sicilian oak, is a species of evergreen oak tree native to Sardinia and Sicily. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its extracts that have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus tenorei include its potential to reduce cardiovascular risk, protect against certain cancers, and support immune system function. Quercus tenorei is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
